<div>
  <h1>Hi there! 👋 I'm Mehdi Faraji</h1>
  
  <h3>Software Engineer | Full-Stack & Mobile Developer</h3>

  <p>
    Passionate Software Engineer with a strong foundation in <strong>JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, and C</strong>. 
    My journey started in frontend development and evolved into full-stack and mobile development. 
    I specialize in building scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications using 
    <strong>React.js, Next.js, React Native, Android Studio,</strong> and <strong>Xcode</strong>.
  </p>

  <p>
    I thrive on open-source collaboration, clean code, and creating impactful products. 
    Currently deepening my expertise in system design, performance optimization, and cloud-native architectures. 
    Always learning and open to interesting collaborations and freelance opportunities.
  </p>

  [![Portfolio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=moqups&logoColor=white)](https://mehdifaraji.ir/)
